description: A two-column resume layout with sidebar (contact, skills, languages) and main content (experience, education, certifications)
visual_assertions: The layout should have two columns: a narrow sidebar (~200px) on the left and a wider main area on the right
The name 'Jane Doe' should be large (28px) at the top
The 'Senior Software Engineer' subtitle should appear in blue below the name
Section headings (CONTACT, SKILLS, etc.) should be in uppercase blue with a blue underline
The skill bars should appear as horizontal progress bars with blue fill at varying widths
Experience items should show job title, company/date metadata in smaller gray text, and bullet points
The tag chips (Rust, gRPC, etc.) should appear as small blue-tinted badges
Education section should show degree, institution, and GPA information
